message:
Use clickable commit references in sync messages

Format: "Sync changelog from tenzir/<project>@<sha>"
GitHub auto-links these to the source commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,7 +60,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Commit changes
         uses: planetscale/ghcommit-action@v0.2.0
         with:
-          commit_message: "Sync ${{ inputs.project }} changelog from ${{ steps.clone.outputs.sha }}"
+          commit_message: "Sync changelog from tenzir/${{ inputs.project }}@${{ steps.clone.outputs.sha }}"
           repo: ${{ github.repository }}
           branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}
           empty: false
